course_title: RESEARCH METHODS IN COMMUNICATION SCIENCES AND DISORDERS
description: Introduction to research methods that produce clinicians and clinician-scientists who: (1) are conversant in and can use scientific principles in their daily lives research, and clinical practice; (2) evaluate scientific evidence as disseminated through multiple channels; (3) find and store research findings efficiently for use in clinical practice or research studies; and (4) understand and implement ethical use of human participants, animal subjects and responsible conduct of research principles in their careers.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Communication Sciences & Disorders MS
